size.title: Icon Size
size.description: Set the default icon size. Set to false to disable the sizing of icon in style.

aliases.title: Icon aliases
aliases.description: Define Icon aliases to update them easily without code changes.

iconifyApiOptions.title: Iconify API Options
iconifyApiOptions.description: Define preferences for Iconify API fetch.

url.title: Iconify API URL
url.description: Define a custom Iconify API URL. Useful if you want to use a self-hosted Iconify API. Learn more: https://iconify.design/docs/api.

publicApiFallback.title: Public Iconify API fallback
publicApiFallback.description: Define if the public Iconify API should be used as fallback.

title.title: Header
title.description: Header title to display if no icon is provided

key.title: Key
key.description: Key in a given Local Storage

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the product pin resource
